words.def: a measuring instrument for measuring and indicating a quantity such as the thickness of wire or the amount of rain etc.
words.zh: n. 標準度量, 計量器
n. 年齡, 老年, 成年, 壽命, 時代, 時期

words.def: a humorous anecdote or remark intended to provoke laughter
words.zh: n. 箝口物, 箝制言論, 討論終結

words.def: animal reproductive body consisting of an ovum or embryo together with nutritive and protective envelopes; especially the thin-shelled reproductive body laid by e.g. female birds
